BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Biomedical Research and Longevity Society Inc

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: To fund and support scientific research and education for the benefit of all humankind with a focus on cryobiology interventive gerontology and cryonics.
IRS990.MissionDesc: To fund and support scientific research and education for the benefit of all humankind with a focus on cryobiology interventive gerontology and cryonics.
IRS990.Desc: The organization provides grants and other support to scientific research institutions for the purpose of advancing research and education in the area of preservation storage and restoration of biological tissue.

Form990PartVIISectionAGrp.PersonNm: James W Clement JD LLM PhD

OtherAssetsOrgGrp.Desc: Cash surrender value of life insurance

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: | PartandLinenumber:,Explanation:| Part V Line 4,Endowment funds have been set aside by the Board of Directors to fund future scientific research in perpetuity.|

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: Part I, II, III and IV
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: | PartandLinenumber:,Explanation:| Part I Line 2,Grant recipients are contractually obligated to submit research progress and financial reports on a quarterly basis. Progress reports detail research conducted during the period and are monitored against predetermined milestones to measure project advancement. Financial reports include detailed expenditure reports by line item which are monitored to ensure that grant funds are used for their intended purpose.|

Grant recipients are contractually obligated to submit research progress and financial reports on a quarterly basis. Progress reports detail research conducted during the period and are monitored against predetermined milestones to measure project advancement. Financial reports include detailed expenditure reports by line item which are monitored to ensure that grant funds are used for their intended purpose.
A draft copy of Form 990 is provided to each member of the board of directors prior to filing.

Proposed and ongoing transactions are monitored for compliance with written policies. Where applicable potential and actual conflicts are monitored to ensure they are handled as provided by said policies.
Where applicable documents policies and financial data are available to the public upon request.

DirectControllingEntityName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Biomedical Research and Longevity Society Inc
Biomedical Research and Longevity Society Inc
